_help: Runnable s05 LLM-assessment config that points at the released artifacts (`./data/evaluation_set/` by default, or `./data/corpus/` if you change `input_dir_joined_snippets_triples`). Pairs with `scripts/slurm/dataset/s05_generate_dataset_with_llm_v9_llama405b.sh` (4× H100) or the 8B variant. To run: build/download the TGI Apptainer .sif, fill in the 3 user-environment placeholders in the SLURM script (cd /path/to/emerge, cd /path/to/data/wikipedia-processing, --nv .../...sif), then `sbatch scripts/slurm/dataset/s05_generate_dataset_with_llm_v9_llama405b.sh config/dataset/emerge/s05_generate_dataset_with_llm/20260510_s05_runnable_on_released/config.json`. The Llama weights (`hugging-quants/Meta-Llama-3.1-405B-Instruct-GPTQ-INT4` or `meta-llama/Meta-Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct`) are pulled by TGI on first start. Output lands at `./output/s05_llm_assessment/...`. By design, `data/evaluation_set/` and `data/corpus/` are already in s05-input format — the iterative-annotation design means s05's output schema = s05's input schema, so you can re-run s05 on the released corpus with a different LLM (or strip `llm_assessment` fields on selected triples and re-query just those, as Part 3 garbage QA does). Sister configs `20251216_v8_llama_405b_v1/` and `20260502_v8_llama_405b_v1_complete_dataset/` are the original Snellius-path versions kept for historical reference.
_input_dir_joined_snippets_triples: Default: the released test set (3,500 instances). Change to `./data/corpus/` to re-annotate the full 1.19M-instance corpus instead. Either path is in s05-input format.
_last_processed_dir: a dir that contains the file indicating the last processed instance idx so if program is restarted, it doesn't have to start from scratch
_triples_only_labels: when llm is given only the labels of the head, relation and tail and not qids, i think it can make it easier
_only_removals: has to be in false for the real dataset generation to also include cases where there are only addition of triples to kg
